query:
-- RBM consignado dos agentes de LUANA em 04/2026
SELECT 
  SUM(c.rbmCreditoC2) as total_rbm_consig,
  SUM(c.rbmConsorcioC2) as total_rbm_consorcio,
  SUM(c.rbmContaCorrente) as total_rbm_cc,
  SUM(c.rbmOurocap) as total_rbm_ourocap,
  SUM(c.rbmSeguros) as total_rbm_seguros,
  COUNT(*) as qtd_agentes
FROM calculos c
INNER JOIN agentes a ON c.chaveJ = a.chaveJ
WHERE UPPER(a.supervisor) = 'LUANA'
AND c.mesRef = '04/2026';

  SUM(c.rbmSeguros) as total_rbm_seguros,
  COUNT(*) as qtd_agentes
FROM calculos c
INNER JOIN agentes a ON c.chaveJ = a.chaveJ
WHERE UPPER(a.supervisor) = 'LUANA'
